HIAT 1889 (3) TRIE 2 FdeR, 2006; 2. BIAL 981 (&) TG 13 T[H, 2007; 3. W 15—25/2009—CEIIT, YRA & XIS19, SRR, T 111, TS 4 a8 4 fade, 2009 DI, 4. ¥ 15—25 / 2009—TEIAIY, WRA & Wolq=, AR, 9FT 111, ©s 4 IR 17 ey, 2010 § ). ). ), ARG 12 SRR, 2012; 8 DI 2460 (o), ARG 9 fdaR, 2015; ). ). -- 2 of 4 -- Lo I-=vg 3(i)] AHT AT ;ST 3 MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 3rd April, 2019 S.0. 1516(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 38L of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972), the Central Government hereby appoints the following members to the National Tiger Conservation Authority for a period of three years, from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette and for that purpose makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O. 1403(E), dated the 4 September, 2006, namely:— In the said notification,— @) for serial numbers 6 to 13 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall respectively be substituted, namely:— “6. | Shri P.R. Sinha, Former Director, Wildlife Institute of India, Dehradun, - Member House No. A-12, Sector -D, Prasad Lab, Kankar Bagh Colony, Patna, Bihar- 800020. A Dr. Tishyarakshit Chatterjee, Former Secretary, MOEF&CC, Plot No. 208-A, Road No. 14, Jubilee Hills, Telangana-500033. Member 8. Shri Hemendra Kothari, Chairman, DSP Black Rock, Mafatlal Centre, 10" | - Member Floor, Nariman Point, Mumbai-400021. Maharashtra 9. Dr. Erach Bharucha, Director, Bharati Vidyapeeth Institute of Environment, | - Member Education and Research, Katraj-Dhankawadi Campus, Pune-Satara Road, Pune-411043 10. | Shri B.K. Patnaik, IFS, Retd. PCCF & CWLW, Uttar Pradesh, 105-Surekha | - Member Villa, Nigamananda Nagar-2, Bomikhal, Bhubaneswar, Odisha-751010. 11. | Shri S.S. Srivastava, IFS, Retd. PCCF & HoFF, Odisha, Flat No. B-031, | - Member Raheja Atlantis, Sector-31, Gurgaon (Haryana)-122001. 12. | Shri Anish Andheria (Ph.D.), Wildlife Conservation Trust, 11™ Floor, | - Member Mafatlal Centre, Nariman Point, Mumbai-400021. 13. | Shri Khageswar Nayak, Retd. Field Director, Kanha Tiger Reserve, S.V.19, | - Member”; Shreekhetra Vihar, Aiginia, Dist. Khurda, Bhubaneswar, Odisha-751019. (ii) for serial numbers 22 to 27 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely:- “22 | Chief Wildlife Warden, Uttar Pradesh - Member 23. | Chief Wildlife Warden, Telangana - Member 24. | Chief Wildlife Warden, Assam - Member 25. | Chief Wildlife Warden, Odisha - Member 26. | Chief Wildlife Warden, Jharkhand - Member 27. | Chief Wildlife Warden, Maharashtra - Member”. [F. No. 15-25/2009-NTCA] Dr. ANUP KUMAR NAYAK, Addl. Director General of Forests (Project Tiger) -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I—SEC. 3(ii)] Note : The principal notification constituting the National Tiger Conservation Authority was published in the Gazette of India, Extra-ordinary vide number S.O. 1403(E), dated the 4th September, 2006 and subsequently amended as follows:— 1.
